✦ a sketch with a story
Hey Taarah…
why are you so sweet
and beautiful? 🌸

tap if you don't know

♡ ♡ ♡
Let me tell you why…

I don't know much about you, and we've never even met in person, but the first time I drew you, something just stayed with me. Your curls, the way they fall so naturally, your face, and especially your eyes… they caught my attention in a way I can't really explain.

Honestly, you're the most beautiful girl I've seen. When I was drawing your eyes, it didn't feel like I was just sketching lines — they felt alive, like they were giving something back, like they had a story or a feeling in them.

Taarah, it's funny how waiting for your replies has quietly become a part of my daily routine now. I find myself checking my phone more than usual, wondering if you've replied, and even that small "seen" from you somehow feels enough sometimes. It's such a small thing, but it stays with me longer than it should.

Maybe it sounds a little crazy since we've never met, but you really do feel like a piece of my thoughts now. And honestly, I don't even question it anymore…

I just like that you're there. 🌙

One last thing, Taarah… 🎶
will you come to an Anuv Jain show with me?
🎊 🎶 🌸
That just made my entire day. I'll get us the best seats, I promise. Until then, here's a song that feels like this moment — soft, warm, and a little unbelievable.
▶
Baarishein
Anuv Jain
Listen on Spotify ↗
🌿
That's okay. Someday is good enough for me. I'll keep this hope like a bookmark. And until that someday — this song is for you, for right now.
▶
ALAG AASMAAN
Anuv Jain
